scope: Fix dev full E2E VA-022 home vertical rhythm failure.

changes.change: Reduced fadeInUp initial transform from translateY(20px) to translateY(8px).
Recorded VA-022 fix plan, backups, validations, and audit artifacts.

notChanged: No home section animation class removed
No backend, public API DTO, Real Backend Test target, production, or CI workflow change

validations.name: dev stack rebuild
validations.command: COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=woong-blog-aspcore-nextjs APP_ENV_FILE=.env POSTGRES_DATA_DIR=.docker-data/dev/postgres LOCAL_CERTS_DIR=.local-certs BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18080 NGINX_HTTP_PORT=3000 NGINX_HTTPS_PORT=3001 docker compose --env-file .env -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build
notes: Docker build context was about 2.01 GB.

validations.name: targeted e2e subset
validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 ENABLE_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=true PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=visible PLAYWRIGHT_E2E_PROFILE=core npx playwright test tests/ui-quality-layout-rhythm.spec.ts tests/ui-quality-motion-access-targets.spec.ts --project=chromium-authenticated --workers=1

risks: Root worktree remains dirty with unrelated pre-existing changes.
CI was not run in this slice.
Production deployment/preflight remains out of this dev-focused slice.
Docker context is large due local generated artifacts.
Full E2E has 53 latency warnings but 0 budget failures.
recommendation: Accept the minimal CSS motion-distance fix, then run CI for the branch/PR if continuing the broader gate objective.
